title: MMO RPG
information: A multiplayer RPG built with Phaser 3, WebSocket, and Supabase. Players join the same world and interact in real time. Currently under construction.

title: Federico Liberati
information: A website for an architect rebuilt from scratch with ASTRO to solve slow load times. The client provided the design and we collaborated step by step.

title: Arpeggio Machine
information: A guitar arpeggio simulator built with vanilla JavaScript. Created to help students visualize fretboard navigation, combining note and arpeggio type selectors to display patterns on the instrument.

title: Platformer Game
information: A platformer built with vanilla JavaScript and HTML Canvas. Includes walking, jumping, wall collisions, and door-based level progression, with GSAP-powered transitions.

title: Ecommerce Backend
information: A backend practice project using Express and MongoDB. Features user authentication with Bcrypt, Nodemailer for email, Multer for file uploads, and role-based access control with an admin panel.

title: Random Book
information: A task organizer for a sheet music book project, built with React and Firebase. Features full CRUD, action history tracking, and a leaderboard for completed tasks.

title: Password Changer
information: A simple JavaScript app that transforms weak passwords into stronger ones. Born from a dream and turned into a working tool.

title: Liszt
information: A task manager with shared tasks between users, built with authentication and full CRUD. Still a work in progress, both visually and functionally.

title: Next Ecommerce
information: An eCommerce platform built with Next.js to explore server-side rendering and Tailwind. Uses Firebase for the backend to speed up development.

title: Auditroim
information: A full eCommerce platform built with React. Features user registration, shopping cart, favorites, checkout flow, and order history.

title: Audio-max
information: My first JavaScript project: a simple eCommerce with cart functionality using localStorage. Simple but where everything started.

title: First Web
information: My very first website. Its design became the foundation for this portfolio — a poetic full-circle moment with HTML and CSS.
